name: Sand Sphinx
rules_text: H:2 A:1 HP:12 L:1 Nomadic, Desertwalk. Target square becomes desert. Sand Sphinx seeks opponent's Sanctum. When Sand Sphinx moves, its new square becomes desert. (Desert causes 1 hit point of damage after start of turn unless group has Desertwalk.) ("Moves" effects happen before any "enters square" effects.)
